name: DaingSilog
description: Marinated and fried milkfish served with garlic fried rice and egg for a classic Filipino breakfast favorite.

name: EmbuSilog
description: Filipino-style embutido paired with garlic fried rice and egg for a hearty and savory silog meal.

name: HotSilog
description: Filipino hotdog served with garlic fried rice and egg for a sweet and savory comfort meal.

name: InasalSilog
description: Flavorful chicken inasal paired with garlic fried rice and egg for a smoky and satisfying Filipino combo.

name: LongSilog
description: Sweet Filipino longganisa served with garlic fried rice and egg for a delicious all-time breakfast favorite.

name: Silog Platter
description: A generous platter of Filipino silog favorites served with garlic fried rice, eggs, and assorted savory meats perfect for sharing.

name: TapSilog
description: Tender Filipino beef tapa served with garlic fried rice and egg for a rich and flavorful breakfast classic.

name: Tocilog
description: Sweet cured pork tocino paired with garlic fried rice and egg for a savory-sweet Filipino breakfast meal.

name: TuyoSilog
description: Crispy dried fish served with garlic fried rice and egg for a simple yet flavorful Filipino comfort breakfast.
